arts.ttl: Why Ollie Watkins was 'not happy' as Aston Villa striker targets huge feat
arts.sum: Ollie Watkins admits he’s frustrated with the limited number of starts he's been given by Unai Emery in recent weeks, but acknowledges the depth of Aston Villa’s squad is stronger than ever. Ollie Watkins scored his 14th league goal of the season against Southampton on Saturday

arts.ttl: I’m not happy being on the bench, says Aston Villa’s Ollie Watkins
arts.sum: The England forward has started four of Villa’s last five matches as a substitute.

arts.ttl: Marco Asensio about to receive perfect chance for Aston Villa redemption
arts.sum: Before the first leg in Paris, Luis Enrique said he wasn’t concerned about Asensio potentially featuring for Villa. Marco Asensio has the perfect opportunity to hit the headlines for the right reasons again next week after seeing two penalties saved in Aston Villa’s 3-0 win at Southampton.
